Subject Line: Business Acquisition Inquiry
Dear [PROFESSIONAL’S NAME HERE],
My name is [YOUR FULL NAME].
We’re searching for businesses in the [SECTOR NAME HERE] sector who are thinking of selling,
getting ready to retire or would entertain a conversation about selling their businesses.
I’m part of a venture to acquire one or several businesses in this space.
Ideally, it would be [REVENUE SIZE OF BUSINESS YOU’RE LOOKING FOR HERE] and located in
the [GEOGRAPHIC AREA].
I am not asking for any specific names from you.
However, if you do have clients who fit the profile above, I would appreciate it if you could mention the
opportunity to them.
If you’d like to contact me about this opportunity, here is my contact information:
[YOUR PHONE NUMBER]
[YOUR PROFESSIONAL EMAIL ADDRESS]
Sincerely,
[YOUR NAME]
